title: iliamna rivularis var. diversa
intro: Iliamna rivularis var. diversa, also known as the western rock rose or rock rose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Iliamna rivularis var. diversa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote healing of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Iliamna rivularis var. diversa can be made into a tea, infusion, or salve, and can also be used as a topical application or added to skincare products for its beneficial properties.
